title: Nightcrawler
content:
{{AltUniverse|3=Characters}} {{Upcoming}} {{Character |real name = Kurt Wagner[https://x.com/AvengersUpdated/status/1995918116451156351 Avengers Updates on X - December 2, 2025] |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Nightcrawler}} |species = [[Mutant]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|GER}}
{{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |movie = ''[[Avengers: Doomsday]]'' (unreleased) |actor = [[Alan Cumming]][https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aZXBFirj6b4 Avengers: Doomsday | Now in Production] |status = Alive}} '''Kurt Wagner''' is a [[mutant]] known as '''Nightcrawler'''. ==Biography== ''To be added'' ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== ''To be added'' ===Abilities=== ''To be added'' ==Relationships== ===Enemies=== *[[Mister Fantastic|Reed Richards/Mister Fantastic]][https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/alan-cumming-teases-pedro-pascal-fight-avengers-doomsday-1236210599/ Alan Cumming Teases Potential Pedro Pascal Fight Scene in ‘Avengers: Doomsday’] ==Trivia== *In the comics, Kurt Wagner is the [[mutant]] son of [[Raven Darkhölme]] and {{WPS|Destiny (Irene Adler)|Irene Adler}}, who was raised by the witch Margali Szardos in a circus in [[Germany]], where he was eventually recruited by [[Charles Xavier]] to join the second iteration of the [[X-Men]] alongside [[Storm]], [[Colossus]] and [[Wolverine]]. ==Behind the Scenes== *Nightcrawler in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] is the second live-action incarnation of the character, following an incarnation portrayed by [[Alan Cumming]] and {{WPS|Kodi Smit-McPhee}}. *In contrast to how his make-up to portray Nightcrawler took four and a half hours to be applied onto him in ''{{WPS|X2 (film)|X2}}'', [[Alan Cumming]] only had to wait ninety minutes to do so for ''[[Avengers: Doomsday]]''.[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZqI93EemSSs Alan Cumming talks Scottish hoolies, ‘Traitors’ S4, return to ‘X-Men’] ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Nightcrawler (character)|Nightcrawler}} [[ru:Ночной змей]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Doomsday Characters]] [[Category:Mutants]] [[Category:Males]]
